name: Painting Contractors
tagline: Painters running on word of mouth alone.
display_description: Finds painting crews near you with happy reviews and no website — the ones living on referrals who never show up when a homeowner searches "painter near me." A simple page with a gallery and a quote form is the gap.
outreach_voice_brief: Write to a painter who's good with a brush, not a browser. Point at the real signal — solid reviews, no site to send people to. Make it concrete: a homeowner wants to see past work before they call, and there's nowhere to send them. Offer a page with a gallery and a quote form. Short, friendly, one ask.
